title: Understanding Newton's Second Law
text: Newton's second law states that the force acting on an object is equal to the mass of that object times its acceleration. This can be expressed as $$F=m a$$.

title: Rearranging the Formula
text: To find the acceleration, you need to rearrange the formula $$F=m a$$ to solve for a. What does the formula become?

title: Calculate the Acceleration
text: Given that the force F is $$18$$ N and the mass $$m$$ is $$2.0$$ kg, use the formula $$a=\frac{F}{m}$$ to find the acceleration.
